title: SRVInfo
description: A plugin that gives important info to ppl
body:
ServerInfo Plugin


ServerInfo is an intuitive and comprehensive Minecraft server information plugin designed to provide players with essential server details at their fingertips. With a focus on simplicity and customization, this plugin bridges the communication gap between server administrators and players by presenting important information in an organized, accessible format.

Key Features

📋 Server Details at a Glance

ServerInfo provides players with immediate access to crucial server information, including:

Server name and description

Current version and supported Minecraft client versions

Server rules and guidelines

Contact information for server staff

Important announcements

🧰 Custom Command Showcase

Server administrators can configure a list of essential commands that players should know, complete with descriptions and examples. This helps new players navigate your server ecosystem more effectively and reduces repetitive questions in chat.

📏 Server Rules Integration

Clearly communicate your server's rules to all players through a dedicated command. Rules are fully customizable through the configuration file and can be updated on-the-fly without server restarts.

🎨 Full Color Support

All messages support Minecraft color codes, allowing server owners to maintain consistent branding and create visually appealing information displays that match their server's aesthetic.

🔄 Live Configuration Reloading

Administrators can update the plugin's configuration without restarting the server, making it easy to keep information current and respond to changes in server structure or policies.

💼 Permission-Based Access

Control who can access different features of the plugin with a granular permission system, allowing staff members to reload configurations while restricting certain commands to specific player groups.


Why Choose ServerInfo?

User-Friendly Experience

ServerInfo was designed with both players and administrators in mind. The intuitive command structure makes it easy for players to find exactly what they need, while the straightforward configuration gives administrators flexibility without complexity.

Resource Efficiency

Built with performance in mind, ServerInfo has minimal impact on server resources. It loads quickly, responds instantly to commands, and doesn't create any unnecessary server lag.

Community Building

By providing clear information, ServerInfo helps create a more welcoming environment for new players. When players understand the rules, know how to use essential commands, and can easily find help, they're more likely to become active members of your community.

Seamless Integration

ServerInfo works alongside your existing plugins without conflicts. It enhances the player experience without changing fundamental gameplay aspects or interfering with other systems.


How to Use

Players can access information using simple commands:

/serverinfo - View main server information
/serverinfo help - Display available commands
/serverinfo rules - Show server rules
/serverinfo commands - List important commands
/serverinfo version - Display version information

The plugin also includes convenient aliases (/sinfo and /si) for faster access.

Technical Details

Compatible with Spigot, Paper, and other Bukkit-based servers

Supports Minecraft versions 1.20 and newer

Lightweight design with minimal performance impact

Extensive configuration options through YAML

Proper permission integration

Experience the difference clear communication makes on your server with ServerInfo - where information meets innovation.
